pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 12: PROJECT_DIR="/home/ga/projects/acme-stack" is created via mkdir -p on line 13
setup_task.sh lines 17-102 create the docker-compose.yml file at the project directory with 9 services
setup_task.sh: api service defined at line 22, database at line 33, cache at line 41. Task description requires these three services to start by default without profiles.
setup_task.sh line 47 defines db-admin service. Task description (lines 20-26 of task.json) assigns db-admin to gui profile.
setup_task.sh line 56 defines cache-admin service. Task description assigns cache-admin to gui profile.
setup_task.sh line 66 defines prometheus service. Task description assigns prometheus to monitoring profile.
setup_task.sh line 75 defines grafana service. Task description assigns grafana to monitoring profile.
setup_task.sh line 85 defines test-runner service. Task description assigns test-runner to test profile.
setup_task.sh line 92 defines db-seeder service. Task description assigns db-seeder to tools profile.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires modifying a synthetically-created docker-compose.yml file with 9 services. The metadata accurately describes the project structure: 3 core services (api, database, cache) must start by default without profiles, and 6 additional services must be assigned to specific Docker Compose profiles. Core services use official public Docker images (python:3.11-slim, postgres:14, redis:7-alpine). Non-core services use nginx:1.24-alpine placeholders. The verifier checks both configuration (service profiles via 'docker compose config') and runtime behavior (container count when running with and without profiles).
